name: Workflow Diagnostic
description: A 3-minute assessment to identify your workflow maturity and next best move.
benefit: Get a practical starting path with a 7-day action plan.

name: Weekly Workflow Checklist
description: A one-page checklist to run planning, execution, and weekly review without drift.
benefit: Reduce planning overhead and stop reactive task switching.

name: Meeting Notes SOP
description: A note-to-action SOP so meetings produce assigned next steps.
benefit: Turn notes into execution in under 10 minutes after each call.

name: Weekly Review Template
description: A practical template to close loops and plan the next week with clarity.
benefit: Keep priorities current and prevent hidden backlog growth.

name: Content Planning Board
description: A simple planning board for weekly content production and promotion.
benefit: Publish consistently without rebuilding your process every week.

name: Client Follow-Up SOP
description: A repeatable communication cadence for active clients and warm leads.
benefit: Improve response consistency and reduce revenue leakage.

name: Tool Stack Audit Checklist
description: A scoring checklist to simplify your app stack and remove redundant tools.
benefit: Lower complexity and reduce context switching across systems.
